summary: Plan-mode inventory classification for one mixed PR shard. No shared canonical was selected. Hydrated open PRs were kept as independent or related work except #84689, which is quarantined to central security handling because the PR concerns provider API keys/plaintext secret serialization. Unavailable refs require human follow-up because live kind/state/updated_at were not hydrated due GitHub API rate limits.

actions.reason: Provider API key/plaintext key serialization is security-shaped and should not be handled by backlog cleanup automation.
